pageContext.name: Black Cicada
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are thrilled to present the haunting and beautiful Black Cicada Statue!  Perhaps one of the more romantic of the true insects, the Cicada lives on this earth for only a short time, darkening and hardening as it readies its body for its final stages. With the gift of song built into their very being, the Cicada has found its way into poetry, literature, and music as a symbol of life and death for its nature as a tragically temporary creature.  A companion to the ethereal White Cicada, this resin statue created by Chen Ziyu x Yoneyama Keisuke x Manas S+U+M would make a perfect addition for all those who love and treasure the beauty of the animal kingdom!  Be sure to add the Black Cicada statue to your collection today!
